prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: CHAINSAW-SHARPENING-BURR-3-16 Product Type: KNIFE_SHARPENER Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: 3/16" File Chain Saw Blade Diamond Sharpening Burr Shank 120 Grit Description: Get your chainsaw blade, or any blade for that matter, in tip top shape with this 3/16" File Chain Saw Blade Diamond Sharpening Burr Shank 120 Grit.

This package includes a 1" working file length, 3/18" file diameter Sharpening burr. The shank diameter is 1/8" with a durable 120 diamond grit metal and handy holding case made of plastic.

This Sharpening Diamond Burr Doesn't just allow you to sharpen chainsaw blades but blades of different sizes and styles. Search Terms: chainsaw sharpener chainsaw teeth sharpener chainsaw chain sharpener chainsaw blade sharpener chainsaw sharpener kit chainsaw sharpener portable chainsaw sharpener steel chainsaw sharpener diamond chainsaw sharpener chainsaw sharpener Features: - Diamond Burr Metal 120 Grit - 3/16" File Diameter - 1/8" Shank Diameter - 1" Working File Length - Plastic Carrying Case Included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Hobby 3/16" Diamond Chainsaw Sharpening Burr

openai.item_name: Universal Hobby 3/16" Diamond Chain Saw Sharpening Burr

anthropic.title_differentiation: 120 Grit Diamond Metal, 18" Shank, 1" Working Length, Plastic Case Included
